query:
SELECT 
  ia.platform,
  ia.handle,
  COUNT(p.id) as total_posts,
  SUM(COALESCE(p.likes, 0)) as total_likes,
  SUM(COALESCE(p.comments, 0)) as total_comments,
  SUM(COALESCE(p.linkedinPublished, 0)) as linkedin_published,
  SUM(COALESCE(p.facebookPublished, 0)) as facebook_published
FROM posts p
JOIN instagram_accounts ia ON p.accountId = ia.id
WHERE p.status = 'published'
GROUP BY ia.platform, ia.handle
ORDER BY ia.platform;

SELECT 
  ia.platform,
  ia.handle,
  COUNT(p.id) as total_posts,
  SUM(COALESCE(p.likes, 0)) as total_likes,
  SUM(COALESCE(p.comments, 0)) as total_comments,
  SUM(COALESCE(p.linkedinPublished, 0)) as linkedin_published,
  SUM(COALESCE(p.facebookPublished, 0)) as facebook_published
FROM posts p
JOIN instagram_accounts ia ON p.accountId = ia.id
WHERE p.status = 'published'
GROUP BY ia.platform, ia.handle
ORDER BY ia.platform;
